'''''Deuterium''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] of the same group as [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']]. It was found departing [[Outpost 327]] by the ''[[Sabra]]'' when the latter docked the station in the [[Mission to Zhar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
